title: CodeForge
description: A competitive coding challenge where participants solve algorithmic problems under time pressure. Test your logic, speed, and problem-solving skills.

title: Circuit Runes
description: Design and simulate electronic circuits to solve real-world problems. Teams compete to build the most efficient and creative circuit solution.

title: Ragnarok Hackathon
description: A 6-hour hackathon where teams build innovative solutions from scratch. Theme will be revealed at the start. Bring your best ideas and coding skills.

title: RoboVikings
description: Build and program robots to navigate obstacle courses and complete challenges. Speed, precision, and creativity are the keys to victory.

title: Bifrost Quiz
description: A technical quiz spanning domains from programming to electronics to general science. Cross the Bifrost bridge of knowledge to claim victory.

title: Valhalla Debates
description: Engage in spirited technical debates on emerging technologies. Argue your stance with facts, logic, and conviction.
